subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Grandeur speaketh, yet the people hear not. Verily, the Spirit beareth glad-tidings unto the servants, yet the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لسان العظمة ینطق و لکن الناس هم لا یسمعون ان الروح یبشر العباد و لکن القوم
subcodes.subjects: @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @Word of God and human limitations, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @idolatry
